properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We keep on running Losing hope, don't know where to go But You've showed us the light and We'll keep on going to a place We can call our home To the one whom we love We heard him calling us "His own", We will not forget how good you are, When we lost our way back home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Born in sin, But your love is great, Greater than this, Yes we are guilty, Of all ungood things, But your love is great, Greater than this.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For Jesus (You) took our place You died for us, Gave us new life, a new life to live. x2

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the midst of a chaos You were there to strengthen us, Surrounded by fear, doubt and worry, But you were there to lift us up, This never ends us, only have shown how great is your love, We will not be shaken, Until you're comin back.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Born in sin, But your love is great, Greater than this.
